title: Paul Finken
compiled_truth: Paul Finken is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-07 to 2001-11-26), Paul Finken sent 9 and received 58 emails, totalling 67 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (9), [Dovie Keprta](people/dovie-keprta) (2), [Kara Knop](people/kara-knop) (2), [Jnugent](people/jnugent-purchasepooling) (1), [Kihansen](people/kihansen-cisco) (1).
